source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clear English analytics UI with stable tabular metrics and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese open-ocean operations, monitoring, forms, tables, and dashboard screens.
layout: Dense 8px product grids, left navigation rails, top search bars, high-speed analytics cards, route data tables, command palettes, chart panels, fin-ray and silver-stripe texture samples, and restrained 8px cards.

prompts.label: Transparent sailfish profile motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Sailfish transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a sailfish profile for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An accurate sailfish in clean side profile, full body visible, long pointed bill, high raised sail-like dorsal fin, crescent tail, streamlined open-ocean anatomy, indigo-blue dorsal sail with subtle fin rays, silver body with a bright silver lateral stripe, blue-black back, pale belly, small natural eye, crisp fins, sleek reflective scales. The identity must read as sailfish, not marlin, swordfish, tuna, or generic fish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the entire bill, sail, pectoral fins, pelvic fins, tail, and silhouette without cropping. Face points right. Clean studio light preserving indigo sail, silver stripe, blue-black shadow, and cool ocean highlights. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the sailfish on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the sailfish.
Constraints: no ocean scene, no waves, no bubbles, no hook, no boat, no props, no second fish, no text, no watermark, no logo, no frame.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sailfish light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sailfish", derived from the visible sailfish motif: indigo sail, silver lateral stripe, blue-black back, pale belly, open-ocean speed and analytics. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible swift analytics system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design-system presentation, intended final asset 3840 x 2160. Make it feel like a polished 4K product design board with large readable labels, precise grid, and no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sailfish, Sailfish Sail, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Swift Analytics Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from a sailfish: dramatic indigo sail fin with radial fin rays, polished silver body stripe, blue-black ocean shadows, cool steel highlights, pale foam surfaces, and open-ocean motion. The board must read as sailfish sail and swift analytics, not generic blue UI.
Typography: English analytics and operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use tabular numbers for high-speed dashboard metrics.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented control, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, metric cards, ocean analytics sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, table rows, data filters, command search palette, date picker, pagination, empty/loading/error/success states, progress, stepper, tooltip, dropdown menu, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, spacing scale, radius samples, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small icon set, token swatches.
Style: swift analytics system, crisp shadcn/tweakcn product UI, restrained 8px card radius, indigo navigation rails, silver active surfaces, cyan focus rings and charts, black-blue separators inspired by the sailfish back, pale foam backgrounds, fin-ray and silver-stripe texture samples, dense but scannable dashboards, polished component examples.
Color palette: indigo sail, midnight ocean, bright silver stripe, steel blue, open-ocean cyan, pale foam, cool graphite, restrained coral red only for destructive states. Avoid unrelated colors.
Constraints: no generic purple-blue gradient dominance, no neon nightclub look, no dark-only board, no stock ocean photo collage, no extra animals, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sailfish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sailfish dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Sailfish" / "Sailfish Sail". Use the visible sailfish motif and visible light board as references. Translate the same swift analytics system into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design-system presentation, intended final asset 3840 x 2160. Make it feel like a polished 4K product design board with large readable labels, precise grid, and no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sailfish, Sailfish Sail, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Swift Analytics Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve the motif-derived system roles from the light board: dramatic indigo sail navigation, silver active highlights, blue-black ocean shadows, cyan focus rings, steel-blue chart tones, pale foam text, graphite separators, fin-ray texture, silver-stripe texture, and the same shadcn/tweakcn component language. The board must read as sailfish sail and swift analytics, not generic dark blue UI.
Typography: English analytics and operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use tabular numbers for high-speed dashboard metrics.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented control, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, metric cards, ocean analytics sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, table rows, data filters, command search palette, date picker, pagination, empty/loading/error/success states, progress, stepper, tooltip, dropdown menu, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, spacing scale, radius samples, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small icon set, token swatches.
Visual details: deep midnight-ocean background, blue-black panels, indigo active rails, silver active surfaces, cyan data highlights, cool steel card borders, thin black-sail separators, subtle fin-ray and silver-stripe texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards, 8px card radius.
Color palette: midnight ocean, ink navy, indigo sail, bright silver stripe, steel blue, open-ocean cyan, pale foam, cool graphite, restrained coral red only for destructive states. Avoid unrelated colors.
Constraints: no neon nightclub look, no pure black flat background, no generic purple-blue gradient dominance, no gaming UI, no stock ocean photo collage, no extra animals, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sailfish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
